danger_signals.meaning: play area limits where player is vulnerable

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: enemies on screen with projectile patterns

world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: enemy density and pattern complexity increases
enemy behavior and projectile patterns intensify or simplify accordingly

environmental_storytelling.example: continuous vertical or horizontal scrolling establishes forward momentum and location traversal
different enemy sprites and formations suggest varied hostile elements across stages

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: responds to input with movement and weapon fire
executes formation patterns and projectile attacks
travel toward target in predictable ballistic paths

notes: Vapor Trail is a classic shoot-em-up with core danger/safety signaling through enemy presence and weapon availability. Available source data is limited to speedrun community metadata (leaderboards, difficulty modes, platform variants). Direct visual and behavioral documentation is minimal in provided sources. T2 tier assessment relies on genre conventions for shmups from the Genesis era.
